mapper.sql: ba.apply_id, ba.user_id, ba.device_id, ba.apply_date, ba.start_date, ba.end_date, ba.borrow_days, ba.purpose_type, ba.purpose_note, ba.status, ba.audit_user_id, ba.audit_time, ba.audit_note, ba.actual_borrow_time, ba.actual_return_time, ba.return_note, u.username, u.real_name, d.device_name, d.device_model
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_apply (user_id, device_id, apply_date, start_date, end_date, borrow_days, purpose_type, purpose_note, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deviceId}, NOW(), #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{borrowDays}, #{purposeType}, #{purposeNote}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM borrow_apply ba JOIN `user` u ON ba.user_id = u.user_id JOIN device d ON ba.device_id = d.device_id WHERE ba.apply_id = #{applyId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_apply WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_apply WHERE DATE(apply_date) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_apply WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('approved', 'borrowed')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_apply WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_apply WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status IN ('approved', 'borrowed')
SELECT FROM borrow_apply ba JOIN `user` u ON ba.user_id = u.user_id JOIN device d ON ba.device_id = d.device_id WHERE ba.status = 'borrowed' AND ba.end_date < #{today} ORDER BY ba.apply_id ASC
